revenue_sniper.name: revenue_sniper
revenue_sniper.description: Identifies immediate revenue opportunities by cross-referencing trending demand signals (Reddit, HN, ProductHunt, Google Trends) with supply gaps. Outputs scored opportunities with competition analysis, pain-point ranking, and a concrete 72-hour action plan to first revenue. Use for: finding underserved niches, validating micro-SaaS ideas, spotting arbitrage between desperate demand and missing supply.
